title: Naza TTDI Sdn Bhd ransomware incident

extortion.description: The company established its foothold in the industry through the development of notable townships and buildings. These developments which are centred around Klang Valley includes the 662-acre Taman Tun Dr Ismail, TTDI Alam Impian, Stadium Malawati, Masjid Al-Ikhlas, and TTDI Jaya.We are ready to upload a lot of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, employee passport numbers, corporate licenses, agreements and contracts, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
